Test done!

Few errors in there, I fired up freebsd current in vmware on the windows box (different hardware) and did usb passthrough and the drive happily wrote.  not sure if that's a useful test but it seems to point less to a catastrophically bad drive.  The hardware with the problem is intel DH61WW.
